category_sources: Official GNU Binutils page describes binary tools including assembler, linker, objdump, and related utilities.
source_facts.description says GNU Binutils for m68k-elf cross development.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as GNU Binutils for the m68k-elf target.
docs_sources: Official GNU Binutils page links to documentation for the current binutils release.
repo_sources: Official GNU Binutils page gives the anonymous Git source tree as sourceware.org/git/binutils-gdb.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names GNU Binutils and m68k-elf cross development.
source_facts.executables lists target-prefixed binutils tools such as as, ld, objdump, and readelf.
